summary: Tested all new features: Composer step (6), Soundtrack AI (9), Trailer duration (4/8/12 sec), Premiere system. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: 12-step wizard verified with Composer and Soundtrack steps working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/composers returns composers list with skills (Melodic Composition, Orchestration, Emotional Impact, Genre Versatility)
Backend: /api/composers requires authentication
Backend: /api/composers pagination works correctly
Backend: POST /api/ai/soundtrack-description generates AI soundtrack description
Backend: /api/ai/soundtrack-description requires authentication
Backend: /api/ai/soundtrack-description accepts custom_prompt parameter
Backend: POST /api/ai/generate-trailer endpoint exists and validates film_id
Backend: Trailer API accepts duration values 4, 8, 12 seconds
Backend: POST /api/premiere/invite requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/premiere/invites returns invites list structure {invites: []}
Backend: /api/premiere/invite validates film existence (returns 404 for invalid film)
Backend: POST /api/premiere/view validates invite existence
Backend: All wizard step endpoints working (genres, sponsors, equipment, screenwriters, directors, composers, actors)
Backend: /api/auth/me returns user data
Backend: /api/films/my returns user films
Frontend: Wizard has exactly 12 steps (1-12 visible in step indicators)
Frontend: Step 6 is COMPOSER step with correct title and composer list
Frontend: Composers show skills: Melodic Composition, Orchestration, Emotional Impact, Genre Versatility
Frontend: Composers show fame categories: Conosciuto, Sconosciuto, Emergente
Frontend: Step 9 is SOUNDTRACK step with AI generation UI
Frontend: Soundtrack step has prompt input with placeholder 'Il tuo concept per la colonna sonora...'
Frontend: Soundtrack step has 'Genera Descrizione AI' button
critical_code_review_comments: Composer endpoint /api/composers correctly returns composers with music-specific skills
Soundtrack AI endpoint uses GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations for generating descriptions
Trailer duration fixed to accept 4, 8, 12 seconds (default 4) instead of old 15 seconds
Premiere system uses friend_nickname parameter (not invitee_id) for invitations
Premiere invites return {invites: []} structure with viewed status tracking
Wizard correctly implements 12 steps: Title, Sponsor, Equipment, Writer, Director, Composer, Cast, Script, Soundtrack, Poster, Ads, Review

success_rate.frontend: 100% (12 steps verified, Composer and Soundtrack working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: New features implemented and verified: 1) Composer as new crew type with skills (Melodic Composition, Orchestration, Emotional Impact, Genre Versatility) - /api/composers, 2) Soundtrack AI description generation - /api/ai/soundtrack-description with custom_prompt, 3) Trailer duration now 4/8/12 sec - /api/ai/generate-trailer, 4) Premiere exclusive system - /api/premiere/invite (uses friend_nickname), /api/premiere/invites, /api/premiere/view/{id} with XP rewards. Wizard now 12 steps: Title(1), Sponsor(2), Equipment(3), Writer(4), Director(5), Composer(6), Cast(7), Script(8), Soundtrack(9), Poster(10), Ads(11), Review(12).
